gazette: Official Journal of the European Union OJ L, 2024/209, 11.01.2024
title: Definitive Implementation of Anti-Dumping Duties on Turkey and China-Originated Steel Bulb Flats (Holland Profile) by the EU
bodyHtml:
As of January 11, 2024, the temporary anti-dumping duties applied since July 13, 2023, on the import of "Steel Bulb Flats" classified under Customs Tariff Position 7216.50.91, originating from both China and Turkey, have been definitively converted into permanent measures by the European Union (EU).

Following the completion of the investigation, anti-dumping duties are now enforced at a rate of 13.6 percent  for products originating from Turkey and 23 percent for products originating from China.

The anti-dumping measure is applicable to "bulb flats" classified under Customs Tariff Position 7216.50.91.00.00 in the Turkish Customs Tariff, specifically for those with a width of up to 204 mm.

In the Customs Tariff Position 7216.50.91 where bulb flats are classified, the EU already imposes an additional customs duty of 25 percent under the defense measures for steel products (Regulation (EU) 2019/159) when country quotas are exceeded.

The enforcement of the anti-dumping duties will be suspended or not collected as long as they are lower than the protective measures mentioned above (see Article 2).

For the official regulation regarding the definitive anti-dumping measure, click here.
